betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Atmosphere Detector§f (advancedrocketry:oxygendetection) is a §6single block§f utility tile that detects whether the surrounding atmosphere is §6breathable§f. It emits a §6redstone signal§f when the air is safe and a different §6redstone signal§f when the air is toxic. It is the §6simplest§f life support infrastructure and is used as a §6door trigger§f for airlocks.

§6Production Path (oxygendetection.json)§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
- Pattern (3×3):
  ```
  p i p
  g b f
  p c p
  ```
- Key: `p`=§6plateSteel§f (forge:ore_dict), `i`=§6User Interface§f (advancedrocketry:misc:0), `g`=§6minecraft:iron_bars§f, `b`=§6libvulpes:structuremachine§f, `f`=§6fanSteel§f (forge:ore_dict), `c`=§6Basic Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:0)
- Output: 1x §6Atmosphere Detector§f (advancedrocketry:oxygendetection)
- Power: 10 RF/t continuous
- Detection range: 8 blocks in all directions

The detector's GUI shows the §6current oxygen concentration§f as a percentage. It outputs §615 redstone§f when the air is breathable (>18% O2) and §60 redstone§f when the air is unbreathable. The detector can be wired to an §6Airlock Door§f (10053) to prevent the door from opening when the air is unsafe.

The atmosphere detector is a prerequisite for the §6Seal Detector§f (10063), the §6Oxygen Vent§f (10051), and every §6sealed habitat§f in the AR progression. It is the §6simplest and cheapest§f life support diagnostic.

§eTip§f: Place the detector on the §6inner wall§f of an airlock with the redstone output wired to the §6inner Airlock Door§f. When the air is unsafe, the inner door will not open — preventing accidental vacuum exposure. For best results, pair with a §6Seal Detector§f (10063) for §6full coverage§f.
